titulo: SFC welcomes appointment and re-appointment of Non-Executive Directors
conteudo_principal: The Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) welcomes the Financial Secretary’s appointment of Mr Bernard Man, SC, and re-appointment of Mr Vincent Chan Chun-hung as Non-Executive Directors, respectively for a term of two years (Note 1). titulo: CFTC, SEC Seek Public Comment on the Harmonization of Portfolio Margining Frameworks | CFTC
